name: stringhetti
description: String utility tools: passphrase generator and text counter

tools.name: generate_passphrase
tools.description: Generate a dash-separated passphrase of random words with a minimum character length

parameters.minChars: integer — minimum character length of the passphrase (min 8)
parameters.includeNumbers: boolean — whether to include a random 2-digit number

tools.name: count_text_stats
tools.description: Count characters, words, and lines in a piece of text
